data.title: JPMorgan clears $50M Galaxy Digital deal on Solana using USDC
data.description:
JPMorgan has completed a $50 million commercial paper issuance for Galaxy Digital Holdings on the Solana blockchain, marking one of the earliest transactions in which a major Wall Street bank has issued and serviced a securities instrument through a public blockchain. Coinbase Global and Franklin Templeton purchased the short-term debt asset, and all payments tied […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-clears-50m-galaxy-digital-deal/

data.title: Bitpanda and EurocoinPay Sign Deal to Expand Regulated Crypto Access in Spain
data.description:
Bitpanda Technology Solutions (BTS), a firm providing digital asset infrastructure, has announced a new partnership with EurocoinPay intended to widen access to institutional-grade crypto liquidity across Spain. Under the agreement, EurocoinPay said it will integrate Bitpanda’s liquidity platform, allowing its users to trade more than 650 crypto-assets with competitive pricing and high-quality execution. EurocoinPay has been a […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitpanda-and-eurocoinpay-sign-deal-to-expand-regulated-crypto-access-in-spain/

data.title: Crypto Shopping Hacks: How to Maximize Value from Gift Cards
data.description:
Looking to do more with your digital assets than just watch them rise and fall on a chart? How about purchasing gift cards with cryptocurrency? Oh, yeah! All you need is crypto funds (let’s say Solana, for the sake of argument and because it’s been growing in popularity) and a trustworthy online platform selling the cards. Now that we’ve set the scenario, the ability to buy gift cards with Solana on CoinsBee (ding, ding, ding!) gives you real, practical value in your everyday life. However, there’s a right way and a wrong way to shop with crypto. This article reveals the smarter, sharper ways to turn your tokens into products, services, and experiences, all without leaving value on the table
source: https://www.ethnews.com/crypto-shopping-hacks-how-to-maximize-value-from-gift-cards/

data.title: Over 80% of Russians are familiar with crypto and nearly half of them want a wallet
data.description:
A sizable majority of Russians are well aware of cryptocurrency, and close to half of those with knowledge would like to have a wallet, a new survey has shown. According to Russia’s largest bank, which carried out the study, the results are a clear indication that Russian citizens favor the legalization of the digital assets […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/over-80-of-russians-are-familiar-with-crypto-and-nearly-half-of-them-want-a-wallet/
